title: Astro Bot Screensaver
summary: An Astro Bot-inspired display with animated dot-matrix eyes and friendly robot faces.
description: Watch seven robot faces blink, glow, and track the pointer with animated LED-style eyes. Pause at any time with the button or Space key.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only animation with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.notes: Screensaver-style motion; keep animation calm and avoid flashing effects.
